chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-04 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.03.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wagan advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper Assistant A.G Sindh a/w SHO of P.S Jhanngro Inspector Ali Asghar Jarwar and IO ASI Dhanji Mal <>*<> Investigation Officer is present and files statement of petitioner, recorded by him, wherein she has categorically stated that she has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 on account of her own accord and wish and no one has abducted her. IO submits that on the basis of such statement he will file his report within three days before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. Ordered accordingly. However, police officials are directed to ensure due protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
